settings.headline:
The Decision Engine
for fit.
settings.subhead: Photo-based sizing · Virtual try-on · Trained on your Shopify size chart.
settings.marquee_text: T-Shirts · Dresses · Suits · Tuxedos · Jeans · Blouses · Jackets · Coats · Activewear · Swimwear · Skirts · Formal Wear · Plus Size · Pants · Shorts

settings.headline: Wrong size. Lost margin.
settings.body: Size returns are the biggest cost in online fashion. Shoppers guess. They order multiples. They send items back. PrimeStyle AI is designed to address this at the source.
settings.pullquote: What if every shopper could see a size recommendation aligned to their measurements before they ever touched Add to Cart?
settings.pullquote_footer: That's what PrimeStyle AI helps with — reducing guesswork and helping minimize sizing uncertainty so shoppers can buy with more confidence.

settings.title: Native Shopify app. Trained on your sizes.
settings.body: Returns are the single largest cost in online apparel — and the merchants solving sizing at the product page are pulling decisively ahead. PrimeStyle AI is the native Shopify app that closes the gap: trained on your size chart, live on every product page, and purpose-built for the conversion economics of modern apparel retail.

settings.title: AI Sizing by Photo
settings.body: One full-body photo. PrimeStyle extracts measurements and returns a recommended size from your Shopify catalog.

settings.title: Smart Size Recommendation
settings.body: Height, weight, age, and body-specific questions — separate flows for men and women. Matched to your Shopify size chart.

settings.title: Virtual Try-On
settings.body: Once the size is found, shoppers see the garment on themselves — inside your Shopify product page.

settings.title: Trained on Your Size Chart
settings.body: Upload a CSV in the Shopify admin. PrimeStyle learns your sizes and recommends fit based on your catalog. Not industry averages.

settings.text: Works with any Shopify size chart
Separate flows for men and women
Reduced guesswork — matched to your Shopify catalog
Illustrated options — designed to reduce guesswork
Matched to your Shopify catalog, not industry averages
Works on any Shopify product page

settings.title: From guessing to knowing — in seconds.
settings.subtitle: Two AI flows. One seamless experience. Built for Shopify.
settings.flow1_body: Shoppers enter height, weight, and a few body-type questions. The Decision Engine matches them to your Shopify size chart — not industry averages — and returns a recommended size in seconds.
settings.step2_body: A few visual questions — narrow, average, or broad. Our engine uses body shape to fine-tune fit, not just raw measurements.
settings.step3_title: A size aligned to your catalog.
settings.step3_body: The Decision Engine returns a recommendation for every piece — jacket, vest, trousers — matched to your Shopify size chart.
settings.flow2_body: Once the size is found, shoppers upload one photo. Our visual AI generates an illustrative preview of them wearing the garment — inside your Shopify product page, before they ever add to cart.

settings.title: Built for production environments.
settings.garments_body: Menswear, womenswear, suits, denim, outerwear, activewear, plus size.

settings.title: Works with every garment.
settings.subtitle: Menswear, womenswear, denim, outerwear, activewear, plus size — if it has a size chart on Shopify, PrimeStyle fits it.
